why_verify_copy_was_used: Another unrelated Project 18 report was already open with the same window title dashboard_final. A uniquely named byte-copy of the clean Project 15 final PBIX was opened to avoid validating the wrong Desktop window; it was saved in Power BI Desktop and copied back to the exact final path.

exact_final_process_check.reason_closed: The exact-path process locked the file but did not expose a targetable visible window while another unrelated dashboard_final was open. It was closed without saving before package readback and verify-copy render validation.
